name: Indexing Pipeline Speed and Memory Footprint Optimization
metricFormula: seconds = wall-clock time to rebuild the indexing corpus; memory_mb tracks peak memory separately; lower seconds is better.

asi.hypothesis: measure the current document indexing path before changing cache and batch behavior
asi.next_action_hint: Try incremental manifest reuse while watching memory footprint and correctness checks

asi.hypothesis: try an alternate batching or cache strategy for the indexing pipeline
asi.next_action_hint: Return to the best kept lane and try a smaller indexing change
